PRIVACY.LABEL: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY.TITLE: PRIVACY POLICY
PRIVACY.SUBTITLE: Your privacy matters to us. Learn how we protect your data.

SECTIONS.COLLECT_TEXT: We collect information you provide when creating an account, such as your name, email, age, weight, height, and fitness goals. We also collect workout progress data to personalize your experience.
SECTIONS.USE_TEXT: Your information is used to generate personalized workout plans, track your progress, and improve our services. We never sell your personal data to third parties.
SECTIONS.STORAGE_TEXT: Your data is stored securely on our servers. We use industry-standard encryption to protect your personal information from unauthorized access.
SECTIONS.COOKIES_TEXT: We use local storage to save your preferences such as language and theme settings. No tracking cookies are used.
SECTIONS.RIGHTS_TEXT: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal data at any time through your profile settings. To request data deletion, contact us at support@trainova.app.
SECTIONS.CONTACT_TEXT: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@trainova.app.

About.HERO_SUB: Trainova is a free fitness platform that helps you build healthy habits from home — no equipment needed.
About.MISSION_TITLE: We Believe Fitness Is for Everyone
About.MISSION_P1: Trainova started with a simple vision: make professional training accessible to everyone without expensive fees or equipment.
About.MISSION_P2: We provide 30-day progressive training programs designed for different goals — Abs, Legs, Back, and Full Body.
About.MISSION_POINT3: Track progress with a professional dashboard
About.VAL1_DESC: Every exercise is purposefully designed to deliver maximum results in minimal time.
About.VAL2_DESC: Your data is protected and never shared with third parties.
About.VAL3_DESC: We believe in collective progress. Every user inspires others.
About.VAL4_DESC: We constantly add new exercises and features based on user feedback.
About.TL1_TEXT: Born from a genuine desire to help people train at home in a structured, effective way.
About.TL2_TEXT: First version launched with four training categories and complete 30-day plans.
About.TL3_TEXT: We continue developing the platform with new features and full Arabic/English support.
About.CTA_SUB: Join thousands of users who train with Trainova every day.

BACK.EX1_INSTRUCTIONS: Grip the bar with hands wider than shoulder width and pull up until chin clears the bar.
BACK.EX1_TIPS: Avoid swinging. Focus on engaging the lats.
BACK.EX2_INSTRUCTIONS: Lie face down and simultaneously raise your arms and legs off the ground.
BACK.EX2_TIPS: Move slowly and controlled without straining the neck.
BACK.EX3_INSTRUCTIONS: Use a table or low bar, pull your chest toward the bar.
BACK.EX3_TIPS: Keep your body straight like a plank throughout.
BACK.EX4_INSTRUCTIONS: Hinge forward with a straight back and row the weight toward your stomach.
BACK.EX4_TIPS: A bag filled with books works as a weight substitute.
BACK.EX5_INSTRUCTIONS: From a full pull-up, push your body above the bar.
BACK.EX5_TIPS: Very advanced — requires significant pulling strength.

ExerciseCard.NO_EXERCISES: No exercises found in this category

ABS.EX1_INSTRUCTIONS: Get into a forearm plank position, keeping your body in a straight line from head to heels.
ABS.EX1_TIPS: Avoid raising or dropping your hips. Breathe steadily throughout.
ABS.EX2_INSTRUCTIONS: Lie on your back with knees bent. Lift your shoulders toward your knees slowly.
ABS.EX2_TIPS: Do not pull your neck with your hands. Focus on contracting your abs.
ABS.EX3_INSTRUCTIONS: Lie flat on your back and lift both legs together to 90° then lower slowly.
ABS.EX3_TIPS: Keep your lower back pressed to the floor and do not let legs touch the ground.
ABS.EX4_INSTRUCTIONS: Sit at 45° with feet slightly raised, then rotate your torso left and right.
ABS.EX4_TIPS: Move in a controlled manner; do not just swing your arms.
ABS.EX5_INSTRUCTIONS: Lift your arms and legs simultaneously to form a V shape, then lower slowly.
ABS.EX5_TIPS: Start slow and focus on balance before increasing speed.

LEGS.EX1_INSTRUCTIONS: Stand shoulder-width apart, lower yourself until thighs are parallel to the ground.
LEGS.EX1_TIPS: Knees should track over toes. Keep your chest up.
LEGS.EX2_INSTRUCTIONS: Step forward and lower your back knee toward the floor.
LEGS.EX2_TIPS: Keep your torso upright and maintain balance.
LEGS.EX3_INSTRUCTIONS: Stand on the balls of your feet and raise your heels slowly then lower.
LEGS.EX3_TIPS: Can be done on a step for deeper range of motion.
LEGS.EX4_INSTRUCTIONS: Place your rear foot on a chair or bench and lower your body slowly.
LEGS.EX4_TIPS: Advanced move that requires good balance. Start slow.
LEGS.EX5_INSTRUCTIONS: Raise one leg forward and squat down on the other leg fully.
LEGS.EX5_TIPS: Very advanced. Begin with support for balance.

FULLBODY.EX1_INSTRUCTIONS: Drop to a squat, jump feet back to plank, do a push-up, then jump up with hands overhead.
FULLBODY.EX1_TIPS: Start slow then gradually increase speed.
FULLBODY.EX2_INSTRUCTIONS: Place hands wider than shoulder-width, lower your chest to the floor and push back up.
FULLBODY.EX2_TIPS: Keep your body in a straight plank line throughout.
FULLBODY.EX3_INSTRUCTIONS: From a plank, drive your knees toward your chest alternately at a fast pace.
FULLBODY.EX3_TIPS: Keep hips level and avoid raising your butt.
FULLBODY.EX4_INSTRUCTIONS: Explode upward from a squat position and land back softly.
FULLBODY.EX4_TIPS: Land on the balls of your feet to protect knees.
FULLBODY.EX5_INSTRUCTIONS: During each push-up, bring one knee toward the same elbow.
FULLBODY.EX5_TIPS: Requires good coordination. Build up slowly.
